name: order-67
description: Single-plugin marketplace for the order-67 research harness ("Proteus Harness"). Internal team distribution: the repo root is the plugin (source "."). Sibling of the order-66 SDD-harness marketplace.

plugins.name: order-67-research-harness
plugins.description: Rigor-aware AI/ML research harness. Skills: /triage, /register, /design-experiment, /data-audit, /plan-runs, /conflicts, /execute, /confound-audit, /analyze, /verify-claim, /paper, /brief, /drift, /atlas, /note. Agents: results-verifier, data-steward, reproducibility-checker, peer-reviewer, figure-smith, run-reader. rigor_tier (exploratory|pilot|confirmatory|publication) gates; pre-registration + leakage + confound-audit gates; never-self-grade; ## Block ABI with a validating block-lint hook.
